name: domain-quantum-applications
description: Use web_search to search for 'quantum computing applications cryptography drug discovery optimization use cases'. Results will overlap with earlier searches. What are the 3 most promising near-term applications for quantum computing? One sentence each. Keep response under 100 words.

ground_truth.reference_answer: Cryptography: quantum computers threaten current RSA and ECC encryption via Shor's algorithm, driving urgent migration to post-quantum cryptography standards, while quantum key distribution offers theoretically unbreakable communication channels. Drug discovery: quantum simulation of molecular behavior at the quantum level could dramatically accelerate identification of drug candidates by accurately modeling protein folding and molecular interactions, reducing the decade-long, billion-dollar development pipeline. Optimization: quantum algorithms like QAOA can tackle combinatorial problems in logistics, portfolio optimization, and supply chain management by evaluating vast solution spaces simultaneously, with IonQ and Ansys already demonstrating a 12% speedup on a medical-device simulation in 2025.
key_facts: Quantum computers can break RSA and ECC encryption, driving adoption of NIST-approved post-quantum cryptography standards
Quantum simulation of molecular interactions could accelerate drug discovery by modeling protein folding and molecular behavior at the quantum level
Quantum optimization algorithms like QAOA can solve combinatorial problems in logistics, finance, and supply chains
IonQ and Ansys achieved a documented 12% speedup over classical HPC on a medical-device simulation in March 2025
Finance and pharmaceuticals are expected to be early adopters within 3-5 years
